items.title: Women’s Africa Cup of Nations postponed just 12 days before the start
items.summary: Caf reschedules tournament after weeks of speculation Decision due to ‘unforeseen circumstances’ The Confederation of African Football has confirmed the postponement of the Women’s Africa Cup of Nations to July-August, just 12 days before the tournament was due to start. The decision ends weeks of speculation as to whether it would go ahead as scheduled this month but leaves teams without games to play during this international break. Continue reading...

items.title: Hakimi en Amrabat bedanken Regragui: 'Je hebt miljoenen mensen geïnspireerd'
items.summary: Marokko is in de ban van het vertrek van Walid Regragui als bondscoach. Vanuit alle hoeken krijgt de opgestapte bondscoach steunbetuigingen na de glorieuze afgelopen jaren. Het ontbreken van een prijs blijft een smet op de samenwerking.

items.title: Palace hand Spurs FIFTH straight defeat as Van de Ven sees red
items.summary: Highlights from the Premier League match between Tottenham Hotspur and Crystal Palace.

items.title: Alarmfase één voor aangeslagen Spurs: rood Van de Ven voorbode van volgende dreun
items.summary: Een rode kaart voor Micky van de Ven luidde donderdag de volgende dramavoorstelling van Tottenham Hotspur in. De in degradatienood verkerende grootmacht ging in eigen huis pijnlijk onderuit tegen Crystal Palace en staat na 29 speelronden nog maar één punt boven de rode streep. Het is alle hens aan dek voor Spurs.

items.title: How relegation could cost Spurs more than £250m
items.summary: BBC Sport explores the potential financial impact should Spurs be relegated to the Championship.

items.title: Sarr sinks 10-man Spurs as Crystal Palace plunge imploding club closer to relegation
items.summary: Tottenham are sinking in a sea of venom. Relegation is no longer a distant prospect for the owners of the finest stadium in the country. They have rolled the dice, replacing Thomas Frank with a bewildered Igor Tudor, but their flaws are starting to look overwhelming and lie only a point above the bottom three after their complete lack of unity and cohesion was exposed in this shambolic defeat to Crystal Palace. This is getting all too real. Tottenham have lost all three of their games since appointing Tudor as their interim manager and are not coping with the pressure. Nottingham Forest and a resurgent West Ham are hot on their heels but Tottenham have frozen. They are winless since the turn of the year and could not even kick on after going 1-0 up against Palace. Continue reading...

items.title: Wakefield beat struggling Hull FC in tense game
items.summary: Watch highlights from the Super League game between Wakefield Trinity and Hull FC.

items.title: Spurs in relegation danger after Van de Ven red helps Palace to easy win
items.summary: Tottenham are in crisis and facing the real possibility of relegation after they crumbled to a shocking 3-1 defeat at home to Crystal Palace, following Micky van de Ven's sending off.

items.title: Vitinha ziet PSG pieken na vertrek supertrio: 'Was niet het beste voor het team'
items.summary: Vitinha won vorig jaar de Champions League met Paris Saint-Germain en wordt gezien als een van de beste spelers ter wereld op zijn positie. Die status had hij niet altijd bij de Parijzenaars, want in zijn beginjaren stond hij in de schaduw van Lionel Messi, Neymar en Kylian Mbappé.

items.title: Regragui stapt op als bondscoach van Marokko
items.summary: Marokko moet een paar maanden voor de start van het WK 2026 op zoek naar een nieuwe bondscoach. Walid Regragui heeft donderdag zijn vertrek bij de verliezend finalist van de Afrika Cup aangekondigd.

items.title: Figo komt met wijze raad voor blessuregevoelige Mbappé
items.summary: De blessure van Kylian Mbappé begint een grote zorg te worden bij Real Madrid. Voormalig Galáctico Luis Figo heeft advies voor de Franse superster in zijn revalidatieproces.

items.title: ITV weighing up whether to show adverts during 2026 World Cup drinks breaks
items.summary: All World Cup matches to break after 22 minutes of each half Adverts can be either normal breaks or split-screen version ITV is in talks with its commercial partners about showing adverts during the mid-half drinks stoppages that will take place in every match at this summer’s World Cup. Global broadcasters have been briefed on Fifa’s stipulations for the three-minute hydration breaks, which will take place after 22 minutes of each half irrespective of the temperature. Continue reading...

items.title: McCullum 'would love to stay' as England coach but ‘hard conversation' needed
items.summary: Brendon McCullum said he "would love to carry on" as England head coach but added that a "hard conversation" was needed following a difficult winter away with the Test team.

items.title: Forest tell Edu to stay away from training ground
items.summary: Nottingham Forest global head of football Edu is asked to stay away from the club's training ground.

items.title: Brighton boss slams Arsenal tactics, tells PL to act
items.summary: Brighton boss Fabian Hürzeler has launched a scathing attack on Arsenal's time-wasting tactics by calling on the Premier League to intervene.

items.title: Bale: Utd made bigger offer for me than Madrid
items.summary: Gareth Bale has revealed that Manchester United came in with a higher offer for him than Real Madrid while he was at Tottenham, but said his heart was set on a move to the LaLiga giants.

items.title: Wrexham draw on Cup history pre-Chelsea clash
items.summary: Phil Parkinson wants to draw on Wrexham's FA Cup history as well as his own when they face Chelsea in the fifth round on Saturday.

items.title: Leagues Cup to play in Mexico for 4th edition
items.summary: The 2026 edition of Leagues Cup will see Liga MX teams host phase one matches for the first time since the intraleague tournament debuted the modern format.

items.title: 'I understand why more teams want golden ticket' - Championship reaction to play-offs extension
items.summary: BBC Sport gets the views of Championship managers as the EFL announces the play-off places will be extended to eighth from next season.

items.title: USMNT 2026 World Cup big board 5.0: Who should make Pochettino's roster for March camp?
items.summary: It's the month of the final matches for the USMNT before its pre-World Cup camp. Who is looking good, and who is on the outside looking in for Mauricio Pochettino's squad?

items.title: Previously silent Iran players sing and salute anthem
items.summary: Alireza Mohebbi, an Australia-based correspondent for Iran International TV, says there is "no doubt" the players are under instruction to sing.

items.title: Championship playoffs will expand to six teams after approval from EFL clubs
items.summary: Two more teams in playoffs from next season Plan meant to increase number of competitive games The Championship playoffs will expand to six teams from next season after the change was approved by EFL clubs on Thursday. The Guardian revealed last month that a proposal to add a quarter-final stage to the playoffs had been recommended by the EFL board, and the clubs gave their assent in a vote at an extraordinary general meeting held at the Belfry. The format will add an eliminator round to the Championship playoffs in a set-up similar to that used by the National League. The fifth-placed team will play eighth and sixth will play seventh, at the higher-ranked club’s ground, in a one-off tie to determine progression to the two-leg playoff semi-finals, against the clubs that finished third and fourth. Continue reading...

items.title: Clubs vote in favour of six-team Championship play-off
items.summary: EFL clubs approve plans to expand the Championship play-offs from four to six teams for the 2026-27 season onwards.

items.title: Nouvelle recrue au Bayern : le club allemand prépare l'avenir
items.summary: Le Bayern va accueillir une nouvelle pépite. Le jeune Autrichien de 16 ans, Matteo Maric, va bientôt être annoncé comme nouveau joueur.

items.title: Les boycotts de supporters se multiplient en JPL cette saison : mais cela changera-t-il quelque chose ?
items.summary: Le boycott des supporters de l'Antwerp à La Louvière n'est pas un cas isolé. Cette saison, les supporters du Club de Bruges et d'Anderlecht ont aussi boycotté certains déplacements par exemple. Mais ces actions sont-elles vraiment efficaces ?

items.title: Mika Godts wint prijs in Nederland maar is er niet bepaald gelukkig mee: dit is de reden
items.summary: Mika Godts is verkozen tot Johan Cruijff Talent van de Maand in de Eredivisie, een prijs die hij dit seizoen al voor de tweede keer wint. Helemaal gelukkig was hij niet. Godts wou namelijk liever Speler van de Maand zijn.

items.title: Vers une délocalisation de la Finalissima ? Voici où pourrait se jouer cette rencontre
items.summary: La Finalissima ne devrait vraisemblablement pas se jouer comme initialement prévu au stade de Lusail, à Doha au Qatar, en raison des tensions au Moyen-Orient. Mais alors, où pourrait se jouer cet affrontement ?

items.title: OFFICIEEL: Walid Regragui stopt als bondscoach bij Marokko, opvolger wordt ex-Anderlechtman
items.summary: Het is officieel: Walid Regragui is niet langer de bondscoach van Marokko. De trainer maakte zijn vertrek zelf bekend via zijn Instagramaccount.

items.title: Druk neemt zwaar toe bij KAA Gent voor cruciale match: "Dat zou een ramp zijn"
items.summary: KAA Gent kreeg vorig weekend een stevige klap tegen KRC Genk en zag de Limburgers over zich heen springen in het klassement. De druk neemt toe, want tegen KV Mechelen wacht een duel dat alles kan bepalen voor de Champions' Play-offs.

items.title: Le Talent du Mois en Eredivisie est belge : voici de qui il s'agit
items.summary: Mika Godts a été élu Johan Cruijff Talent du Mois en Eredivisie, une récompense qu'il remporte pour la seconde fois cette saison.
